Class Game

java.lang.Object
product.Product
product.StoreProduct
product.Game
public class Game extends StoreProduct
It implements the game store product type

  • Constructor Details

    • Game

      public Game(String id, double price, String name, String description, String photo, double averagePunctuation, LocalDate addedDate, int stock, int assignedNumPlayers, String assignedAgeRange, GameStyle assignedGameStyle, Category... categories)
      A game's general constructor
      Parameters:
      id - the game's id
      price - the game's price
      name - the game's name
      description - the game's description
      photo - the game's photo's path
      averagePunctuation - the game's average punctuation
      addedDate - the game's added date
      stock - the game's stock
      assignedNumPlayers - the game's num players
      assignedAgeRange - the game's age range
      assignedGameStyle - the game's style
      categories - the game's categories

    • Game

      public Game(double price, String name, String description, String photo, int stock, int assignedNumPlayers, String assignedAgeRange, GameStyle assignedGameStyle, Category... categories)

      photo - the game's photo's path
      stock - the game's stock
      assignedNumPlayers - the game's num players

      assignedGameStyle - the game's style
      categories - the game's categories
